responseBody={"content":[{"company_public_id":"658260","company_uuid":"00505682-f25b-1ee9-bd91-d2504a0377fb","description":"The maximum processing area is X=800 mm; Y=600 mm; Z=400 mm.

Below are some details of our capabilities:

Part size, CAD data formats

SolidWorks

IGES

Other formats are available upon request.","external_url":"https://www.alfred-schweizer.de/fraesteile.php","id":"c0387eb4-cdb0-513a-b835-e8965f59f9b6","image":"https://media.visable-staging.com/https://supplier-offers-media-production.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/a03505a9-deaa-11ed-8bb9-0a58a9feac02.jpeg?w=300&h=300","image_caption":"Milled Parts","images":[{"position":0,"url":"https://media.visable-staging.com/https://supplier-offers-media-production.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/a03505a9-deaa-11ed-8bb9-0a58a9feac02.jpeg?w=300&h=300"}],"is_indexable":false,"is_published":false,"is_similar":false,"is_top_product":true,"language":"en","name":"Milled Parts","price":{"currency":"EUR","kind":"from","min":"10","original_currency":"EUR","original_min":"10","vat_included":false},"product_attributes":[],"short_description":"Milled Parts","uuid":"c0387eb4-cdb0-513a-b835-e8965f59f9b6"},{"company_public_id":"658260","company_uuid":"00505682-f25b-1ee9-bd91-d2504a0377fb","description":"The equipment of the machines is tailored to the requirements of plastic processing.

In the manufacturing area "CNC Turned Parts," components with a center distance of up to 800 mm and a turning diameter of up to 80 mm from bar stock, as well as a diameter of up to 400 mm from a chuck, are produced.

The equipment of the machines is tailored to the requirements of plastic processing. They complement each other with their different turning diameters. This allows for the economical production of various part dimensions while simultaneously achieving and ensuring a high level of utilization and flexibility.

Regular quality, product, and process inspections are a prerequisite for our internal operational maxim: Our customers receive products of optimal quality.","external_url":"https://www.alfred-schweizer.de/drehteile.php","id":"cd98c92e-eea4-5f39-bda0-a893050f4c17","image":"https://media.visable-staging.com/https://supplier-offers-media-production.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/213d533e-deab-11ed-b226-0a58a9feac02.jpeg?w=300&h=300","image_caption":"CNC Turned Parts","images":[{"position":0,"url":"https://media.visable-staging.com/https://supplier-offers-media-production.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/213d533e-deab-11ed-b226-0a58a9feac02.jpeg?w=300&h=300"}],"is_indexable":false,"is_published":false,"is_similar":false,"is_top_product":true,"language":"en","name":"CNC Turned Parts","price":{"currency":"EUR","kind":"fixed","min":"100","original_currency":"EUR","original_min":"100","vat_included":false},"product_attributes":[],"short_description":"CNC...(truncated)
